narrative_suggested: The image presents a line graph showing the sales volume of PHEV cars in the EU, comparing Chinese and German carmakers over time.
description: A line graph titled 'PHEV sales in the EU: Chinese carmakers vs German carmakers' displays half-year sales volume from H1-2020 to H2-2025. Three lines represent 'VW Group' (blue), 'Mercedes-Benz Group' (green), and 'BMW Group' (light blue), all German carmakers, and 'Chinese carmakers' (orange). The graph shows varying sales trends for each category over the specified period.
